monitor.capture_what: The XPath expression string argument passed to .xpath(), which should contain injected XPath metacharacters from the tainted cookie value

oracle_check.condition_description: The XPath expression string contains unescaped XPath injection payloads: single quotes combined with XPath operators/keywords (or, and, =), predicate-breaking bracket sequences, or union operator patterns that indicate the user-controlled value was concatenated unsafely into the expression
oracle_check.raise_message_template: XPATH_INJECTION: XPath expression contains injected payload from unsanitized cookie input — captured={captured} pattern={matched_pattern}
